_comment: EXAMPLE / SCHEMA ONLY — copy to sentinel_config.json on the host and fill real values. sentinel_config.json is GITIGNORED (Sprint-27 W2, Ops O1): it holds the LIVE IBKR-synced NAV and must NEVER be git-tracked, so a rollback (git checkout/reset) can never overwrite the live NAV.
